protocol_notes: Extensive protocol documentation: maintains dedicated mini fridge with compressor and temperature monitoring via Home Assistant with ESP32 and Noctua fans. Tracks: order dates, delivery dates, batch numbers, CAS numbers, third-party lab results (nominal vs actual contents, endotoxin levels), reconstitution dates, bacteriostatic water amounts, exact dosages in mg/mcg and insulin syringe units. Uses triple-check calculation method for dose verification. Maintains Excel log of all injections with dates and times. Performs sterile technique with alcohol prep pads on stoppers and injection sites. Estimates practicing better hygiene/documentation than 80% of peptide users.
